text:
File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): OT line 

VALUES: https://www.cms.gov/Medicare/Medicare-Fee-for-Service-Payment/PhysicianFeeSched/PFS-Relative-
Value-Files.html 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: This variable has been retired; therefore, the field is blank starting with the 2023 Release 1 RIF. 

This data element is expected to capture data from HIPAA 837I claim loop 2400 SV202 or UB-04 FL 44 
only if the value represents a HCPCS/CPT.
